title: Managing Systemic Supply Chain Risk to the U.S. Economy from Trade Concentration and Geopolitical Conflict
description: Global trade delivers materials and manufactured goods through supply chains worldwide to fuel national economies. This report examines policy issues related to managing systemic supply chain risks from trade concentration and geopolitical conflict.
